description.en: Change a registered file object’s monitored events or attached data. This is equivalent to BaseSelector.unregister(fileobj) followed by BaseSelector.register(fileobj, events, data), except that it can be implemented more efficiently. This returns a new SelectorKey instance, or raises a ValueError in case of invalid event mask or file descriptor, or KeyError if the file object is not registered.
